notes: Blind single-company pass: only CMG sources read; no shared catalog or peer names consulted. Dedup done within CMG only (e.g. menu_price / same_store_sales / restaurant_transactions appear once each even though cited in nearly every earnings release).
All 60 events reviewed in order; 20 events are administrative 8-Ks (Items 5.02/5.07/7.01/9.01 etc.) with header-only content and no causal text - no candidates coined from them.

All 8 fiscal.ai KPI labels rewritten to standard driver names (raw label kept as evidence_quote): Comparable Restaurant Sales Increase -> same_store_sales; Net Restaurant Openings -> new_restaurant_openings; Transactions Increase -> restaurant_transactions; Menu Price Increase -> menu_price; etc.

Judgment call: 'new_restaurant_openings' kept despite 'opening' appearing in the quick banned-word summary - it is the company's own named key operating metric (a count, like 'bookings'), which DriverOntology R7 explicitly allows as a stable metric phrase; same logic for international_restaurant_openings and construction_permit_delays (recurring condition class, source's own words).
Judgment call: consumer_sentiment kept as a qualified standard macro variable (bare 'sentiment' alone would be banned); high_efficiency_equipment uses the company's own equipment-package name.

Skipped as vague/non-reusable/minor (12): persistent macroeconomic pressures (bare macro), value proposition (vague brand claim), AI personalization journey (vague), Southern California wildfires (company said impact minimal), loyalty accounting headwind (one-off accounting), paper costs and chip-frying oil usage (minor one-off cost notes), CEO transition (only nameable with banned change-words; cost effect already covered by stock_based_compensation), energy prices (only as indirect consumer-pressure mention), geopolitical conditions (bare category), tortilla/queso/salsa/beans/rice cost mentions (folded under food_beverage_packaging_costs rather than coined individually), in-app suggestive selling (vague).
Earnings convention: only guidance-mechanism drivers coined (same_store_sales_guidance, new_restaurant_openings_guidance) - CMG sources never reference consensus, so no *_surprise names were coined.
